stepsSummary: Export CSV files and import a CSV sample through mapping UI.
expectedSummary: At least one CSV download is produced and import commit confirms inserted rows.
summary: BUG: UAT-012 CSV export and import mapping - Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
reproSteps: Trigger CSV export from Data Studio and verify download output.
Commit import and verify summary reports imported rows.
expected: At least one CSV download is produced and import commit confirms inserted rows.
recommendation: Fix the failing Export flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-012 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: CSV export action emits downloadable file.
Verify: CSV import commit path inserts valid records.
